title: pelargonium benguellense
intro: Pelargonium benguellense, also known as Benguella geranium or Benguelense geranium, is a plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been found to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Pelargonium benguellense include its ability to aid in the management of certain respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium benguellense are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine practices to harness its therapeutic properties.
